title: geography — model relationships
description: Vendor `nnjeim/world` ships the base relations. We rebind `config('world.models.*')` so every vendor relation returns our subclasses. No app-level FK migrations are added (vendor owns them).

internal.description: Legally-scoped currency associations. A country can have multiple currencies (e.g., primary + regional).
Primary country association (an ISO-639 language row may nominate one country as its cultural origin).

inbound.description: Downstream domain modules reference geography rows by their vendor integer PKs (or ISO codes) but do NOT compose BelongsToCountry / BelongsToLanguage traits because reference data is global — the FK is a soft reference. Foundation macros will offer `->countryReference()` / `->currencyReference()` helpers for models that carry an ISO code column.

resolve_route_binding.description: Country, Language, Currency accept both numeric PK and ISO code. Timezone accepts IANA name. See Country::resolveRouteBinding() for the pattern.
